mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_usage_log (session_id, provider_id, provider_name, model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, duration_ms, status, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{providerId}, #{providerName}, #{model}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{durationMs}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS callCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COALESCE(SUM(prompt_tokens), 0) AS promptTokens, COALESCE(SUM(completion_tokens), 0) AS completionTokens FROM ai_usage_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS callCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens FROM ai_usage_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
